description: Product Description Green Costume Accessories Set Stripe Tie with Blue Glasses Gloves Pink Pom-Pom for Halloween Cosplay Stripe Tie with Blue Glasses, Gloves and Pink Pom-Pom for Men Women for Cosplay Dress Up This green costume accessory set is crafted with premium materials to ensure comfort and durability. The blue oval sunglasses feature lightweight plastic frames, offering a light and cozy wearing experience. The bright green long gloves are made from highly elastic, skin-friendly fabric that fits most adult hands snugly and comfortably. The black-green striped tie is constructed from soft fabric with excellent drape, providing a smooth touch and stylish appearance. The pink pom-pom is made of soft plush material, delivering a comfortable texture and a cute, detailed look. Every piece is designed to let you enjoy your cosplay or party look. Halloween Green Costume Accessories Blue Sunglasses Green Stripe Tie Long Gloves Pink Pom Pom Cosplay Party Blue Oval Sunglasses The blue oval sunglasses have a width of 5.7in/14.5cm, with an eye-catching shape that mirrors the iconic style. Elastic Long Gloves The bright green long gloves are made of elastic fabric to fit most adult hand sizes perfectly, offering both style and flexibility. Fashionable Stripe Tie The black-green striped tie features a classic pattern with a standard length, ensuring a neat and fashionable drape. Cartoon Character Cosplay Green Accessories Set Men Halloween Cosplay Fun Role-Playing This set includes everything needed for a complete look: 1*black-green striped soft tie, 1*pair of high-quality blue plastic oval glasses, 1*pair of green long gloves, and 1*soft pink pom-pom. Here are the sizes: the blue glasses are 5.7in/14.5cm wide, stylish and comfortable. The green gloves are 20.4in/52cm long, designed with elasticity to fit most adults. The tie is 55in/140cm long, a standard length for easy styling. The pink pom-pom has a 2.5in/6.5cm diameter, perfect for adding a pop of color. Green Costume Accessory Set for Halloween, Cosplay, Themed Parties And Daily Fun Versatile Green Costume Set for Halloween, Cosplay, Theme Parties, Festivals, Photo Shoots & More This green costume accessory set is not limited to Halloween. It’s ideal for cosplay parties, Christmas gatherings, theme parties, stage performance, reading days, photo shoots, and even playful everyday styling. Whether attending a costume ball, a birthday party, or any festival, this set will boost the fun and make you the center of attention wherever you go. Green Cosplay Accessories Set - Ideal Gift for Halloween Enthusiasts, Cosplay Fans Animated Movie Character Costume Accessories for Birthdays, Holidays & Special Occasions This green costume accessories for adult is perfect for anyone who loves Halloween, cosplay, or classic cartoon characters. It comes with all the key accessories to create a complete look, making it easy for the recipient to embrace their favorite character or add fun to their wardrobe. Whether for a birthday, Christmas, or any special occasion, this set is a thoughtful and exciting gift. It’s also great for party lovers who want to stand out at theme parties or costume events. Give the gift of fun and style with this well-crafted accessory set.
